description: Multi-turn: first inspect agent memory (CLI read path, covers `neomind agent memory <id>`; previously only clear-memory was covered) -> then clear it (pairs with existing clear-memory case).

turns.user: What execution memory has demo-agent accumulated recently? Please list it.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent resolves demo-agent's id, then runs `neomind agent memory <id>` (or GET /api/agents/<id>/memory) and reports the journal/knowledge files to the user (empty is a valid answer, but must be grounded in the tool result)
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind agent clear-memory <id>` and clearly confirms the wipe
expectations.overall: Both turns must reuse the same id, not answer from imagination
